mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, nickname, signature, avatar, profile_background, phone, phone_visible, email, email_visible, wechat, wechat_visible, qq, qq_visible, private_chat_enabled, gender, role_id, status, username_update_year, username_update_count, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{signature}, #{avatar}, #{profileBackground}, #{phone}, #{phoneVisible}, #{email}, #{emailVisible}, #{wechat}, #{wechatVisible}, #{qq}, #{qqVisible}, #{privateChatEnabled}, #{gender}, #{roleId}, #{status}, #{usernameUpdateYear}, #{usernameUpdateCount}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_user set password = #{password}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update sys_user
username = #{username},
nickname = #{nickname},
signature = #{signature},
phone = #{phone},
phone_visible = #{phoneVisible},
email = #{email},
email_visible = #{emailVisible},
wechat = #{wechat},
wechat_visible = #{wechatVisible},
qq = #{qq},
qq_visible = #{qqVisible},
private_chat_enabled = #{privateChatEnabled},
gender = #{gender},
avatar = #{avatar},
profile_background = #{profileBackground},
username_update_year = #{usernameUpdateYear},
username_update_count = #{usernameUpdateCount},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
